comments.text: The lower bound was improved to $(\log n)^{11/13}$ by Stewart ("Cubic Thue Equations with Many Solutions"; IMRN 2008), relying on an elliptic curve construction of Elkies and Rogers ("Elliptic Curves $x^3+y^3=k$ of High Rank"; International Algorithmic Number Theory Symposium 2004). (The reference was located by GPT-5.) (The site has been updated to address this comment.)
